Regular high kick does no damage
Regular high kick does mega damage
Roundhouse foot sweep does no damage
Roundhouse foot sweep does mega damage
All Bosses Accessable on character select Screen
Liu Kang Stage - Press Punch Close
Liu Kang Fatality - Press Kick Sweep or Close
Sub Zero Stage - Press Punch Close
Sub Zero Fatality - Press Kick Then Punch
Kitana Fatality - Hold Block And Press Kick Close
Reptile Fatality - Press Punch Sweep or Close
Shang Tsung Fatality - Hold Block And Press Punch Sweep
Mileena Fatality - Press Kick Sweep or Close
Scorpion Fatality - Press Punch Sweep or Close
Jax Fatality - Press Punch Sweep or Close
